lines.english: How did Mrs. Sterling get her bag back?
lines.chinese: 斯特林夫人是如何找回她的包的？
lines.raw: How did Mrs. Sterling get her bag back? | 斯特林夫人是如何找回她的包的？

lines.english: Mrs. Anne Sterling did not think of the risk
lines.chinese: 安妮·斯特林夫人没有考虑到她所冒的风险，
lines.raw: Mrs. Anne Sterling did not think of the risk | 安妮·斯特林夫人没有考虑到她所冒的风险，

lines.english: she was taking when she ran through a forest after two men.
lines.chinese: 当她穿过森林追赶两个男人时。
lines.raw: she was taking when she ran through a forest after two men. | 当她穿过森林追赶两个男人时。

lines.english: They had rushed up to her while she was having a picnic at the edge of a forest
lines.chinese: 当她和孩子们在森林边缘野餐时，他们冲了过来，
lines.raw: They had rushed up to her while she was having a picnic at the edge of a forest | 当她和孩子们在森林边缘野餐时，他们冲了过来，

lines.english: with her children and tried to steal her handbag.
lines.raw: with her children and tried to steal her handbag. | 试图偷走她的手提包。

lines.english: In the struggle, the strap broke and,
lines.raw: In the struggle, the strap broke and, | 在搏斗中，包带断了，

lines.english: with the bag in their possession,
lines.raw: with the bag in their possession, | 包落到了他们手里，

lines.english: both men started running through the trees.
lines.chinese: 两人便开始穿过树林逃跑。
lines.raw: both men started running through the trees. | 两人便开始穿过树林逃跑。

lines.english: Mrs. Sterling got so angry that she ran after them.
lines.chinese: 斯特林夫人非常生气，她追了上去。
lines.raw: Mrs. Sterling got so angry that she ran after them. | 斯特林夫人非常生气，她追了上去。

lines.english: She was soon out of breath,
lines.raw: She was soon out of breath, | 她很快就气喘吁吁，
but she continued to run. | 但她继续奔跑。

lines.english: When she caught up with them,
lines.raw: When she caught up with them, | 当她追上他们时，

lines.english: she saw that they had sat down and were going through the contents of the bag,
lines.chinese: 她看到他们已经坐了下来，正在翻看包里的东西，
lines.raw: she saw that they had sat down and were going through the contents of the bag, | 她看到他们已经坐了下来，正在翻看包里的东西，

lines.english: so she ran straight at them.
lines.chinese: 于是她直接向他们冲过去。
lines.raw: so she ran straight at them. | 于是她直接向他们冲过去。

lines.english: The men got such a fright that they dropped the bag and ran away.
lines.chinese: 男人们吓了一跳，扔下包就跑了。
lines.raw: The men got such a fright that they dropped the bag and ran away. | 男人们吓了一跳，扔下包就跑了。

lines.english: 'The strap needs mending,' said Mrs. Sterling later, 'but they did not steal anything.'
lines.chinese: “包带需要修一下，”斯特林夫人后来表示，“但他们什么也没偷走。”
lines.raw: 'The strap needs mending,' said Mrs. Sterling later, 'but they did not steal anything.' | “包带需要修一下，”斯特林夫人后来表示，“但他们什么也没偷走。”
